summary: Frontend testing of unified dark footer design across Homepage and other pages. All 8 features tested and passed. Homepage has continuous dark wrapper (#050A1A) from 'Ce que nos bailleurs disent de nous' section through footer. Other pages (/logements, /equipe) have standalone footer with dark premium background.
passed_tests: Homepage: dark-premium-wrapper contains SocialProofSection, FinalCTASection, and Footer
Homepage: Dark wrapper has gradient background (linear-gradient #050A1A to #0A1628 to #030812)
Homepage: No color break - all child sections have transparent background
Homepage: Final CTA has cta-dark-premium class with transparent bg and semi-transparent card
Homepage: Footer uses variant='embedded' with no separate background
/logements: Footer has footer-dark-premium class with dark gradient background
/equipe: Footer has footer-dark-premium class with dark gradient background
Footer WhatsApp button has gradient (#0097b2 -> #7ed957) on all pages
Footer social icons (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Email) have hover:bg-gradient-to-r effect
Footer has subtle top border (border-t border-white/10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer design unified across all pages. Homepage uses dark-premium-wrapper class containing SocialProofSection + FinalCTASection + Footer(variant='embedded'). Other pages use Footer(variant='default') with footer-dark-premium class. Palette: #0097b2 -> #7ed957 (accent gradient), #050A1A (dark background). All social icons have hover gradient effect. WhatsApp buttons use the accent gradient.

tested_features.homepage_dark_wrapper_continuity: PASS - SocialProof, CTA, Footer all inside .dark-premium-wrapper
tested_features.homepage_no_color_break: PASS - All sections have transparent bg, wrapper provides gradient
